anchors.color_strategy: quiet neutral field with one command or status accent
anchors.signature: real terminal, editor, trace, diff, or architecture proof

anchors.color_strategy: neutral work surface with semantic status colors
anchors.signature: decision-first metrics, exceptions, filters, and repeated actions

anchors.color_strategy: brand-led but interaction states remain distinct
anchors.signature: connected task flow shown in target device context

anchors.type_roles: approachable display plus highly readable body
anchors.signature: progress, examples, feedback, and recovery remain visible

anchors.type_roles: serif-sans reading pair with precise captions
anchors.color_strategy: paper or neutral field with evidence accent
anchors.signature: thesis, source rail, figures, counterpoint, and implication

anchors.type_roles: restrained display face plus neutral body
anchors.color_strategy: object-led neutral palette with controlled contrast
anchors.signature: large truthful object view, material detail, and minimal annotation
